description:
A powerful military rifle chambered in .30-06, developed to replace the US Army's older Krag rifle.  It served as the main American rifle in World War I, was used alongside the M1 Garand in World War II, and was used as a sniper rifle as late as the Vietnam War. This one has an absolutely humongous 25rd magazine, & was originally a very experimental weapon, that is now being produced by Jenny Manufacturing.

 "It takes all of sunday to load, but you can fire it all week" - Unknown.
